M-055.NAME: mtproto-runtime-telemetry-bridge
M-055.path: mtproto-runtime/apps/kpproton_proxy/src/mtproto/kpproton_usage_telemetry.erl mtproto-runtime/apps/kpproton_proxy/src/mtproto/kpproton_usage_metric_backend.erl mtproto-runtime/apps/kpproton_proxy/src/mtproto/kpproton_usage_sampler.erl mtproto-runtime/src/kpproton_app.erl mtproto-runtime/src/kpproton_sup.erl mtproto-runtime/src/kpproton_policy_handler.erl mtproto-runtime/src/kpproton_web.erl backend/app/mtproto/runtime_bridge.py backend/app/mtproto/usage_ingestion.py backend/app/tasks/scheduler.py scripts/phase42-mtproto-telemetry-smoke.mjs scripts/phase43-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-42.xml docs/plans/Phase-43.xml
M-055.owns: Secret-free telemetry extraction from the KPprotoN runtime, mtproto_proxy metric backend, active-SNI sampler, private telemetry API, backend ingestion, and bounded runtime buffers.
M-055.purpose: Move runtime connection, traffic, error, unknown-SNI, and req_pq metadata from the DE edge into KrotPN analytics safely.

exports.runtime-telemetry-event: Handshake, close, bytes, error, unknown_sni, rejected_sni, active_connection, and req_pq proof metadata event.
exports.runtime-resource-snapshot: Phase-43 proxy CPU, RAM, uptime, dropped telemetry, and buffer health summary for admin runtime health.
exports.api-runtime-telemetry-snapshot: Token-protected private runtime endpoint returning current counters without draining them.
exports.api-runtime-telemetry-drain: Token-protected private runtime endpoint returning and acknowledging new events by cursor.
exports.task-mtproto-telemetry-ingest: Scheduled backend task that polls the runtime and writes M-054 records.

M-055.evidence: pass-local 2026-05-20: runtime telemetry resource metrics, backend snapshot adapter, scheduler regression, Phase-43 static smoke, and mtproto-runtime rebar3 compile passed.

runtime-contract.item-1: Telemetry API is private and protected by the existing runtime token or a dedicated telemetry token.
runtime-contract.item-2: Runtime buffers are bounded and loss-tolerant; overflow increments a dropped_events counter rather than blocking proxy traffic.
runtime-contract.item-3: Events include assignment_id/user_id only when policy metadata is known; unknown SNI stays safe and masked.
runtime-contract.item-4: Live sampler emits per-SNI active_connection, handshake, and close events from mtproto_proxy policy counters.
runtime-contract.item-5: Traffic bytes are exact globally; per-SNI byte attribution is emitted only when one active domain is visible, otherwise events remain global_runtime to avoid false user attribution.
runtime-contract.item-6: Phase-43 client IP metadata is emitted only when the runtime can provide a trustworthy source address; otherwise source_ip_unavailable must be explicit.

constraints.constraint-1: No full tg links, derived secrets, base secret, salt, runtime token, or private keys in runtime events.
constraints.constraint-2: Telemetry ingestion failure must degrade analytics only, not MTProto availability.
constraints.constraint-3: Live release requires no-regression proof for issued-link req_pq and Telegram client behavior.

M-055.hotspot: H-042: Runtime telemetry must be secret-free, bounded, and resilient so analytics cannot break the MTProto data-plane
